item.title: Competence network inflammatory bowel diseases in Germany: 25 years of interdisciplinary and cross-sectoral research and knowledge transfer across all levels of IBD care.
item.description: Therapeutic advances in gastroenterology - Review - The Competence Network Inflammatory Bowel Diseases (Kompetenznetz Darmerkrankungen) was established in Germany in 1999 through a 10-year funding programme by the German Ministry of Education and Re...

item.title: The effects of intravenous immunoglobulin on intestinal inflammation: a systematic review of animal and clinical studies.
item.description: PeerJ - Systematic review - Intestinal inflammation encompasses a range of conditions, including inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), radiation-induced enteritis, and chemotherapy- or toxin-induced epithelial injury. Although in...
